text: I feel a quiet excitement buzz within me as I walk through these spaces. The glass-walled room with its people and refreshments hints at a gathering of minds, perhaps for a seminar or discussion. The vibrant R&D exhibit on the wall—with its bold colors and talk of humans and machines—stimulates my curiosity and contemplation about the future. I sense the convergence of knowledge and innovation, and I feel both a participant and an observer in the unfolding dialogue between technology and humanity.
